data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: WhatsApp utilizes cloud infrastructure to handle its vast pool of global communications efficiently.
data.technical_spec: AWS, Google Cloud and other high-availability cloud services power WhatsApp's backend infrastructure.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Leveraging microservices for modular architecture enabling scalable and maintainable code.
data.technical_spec: Containerized microservices deployed using Kubernetes across multiple cloud regions.

data.title: Distributed Database Systems
data.description: WhatsApp employs distributed databases to handle large volumes of data with high availability and redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Cassandra and Kafka used for real-time data processing and storage.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption Protocol
data.description: High-security messaging ensured through sophisticated encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: Encryption using Signal Protocol for securing conversations end-to-end.

data.title: Cross-Platform Development
data.description: Ensures consistent functionality across Android, iOS, Web, and Desktop platforms.
data.technical_spec: React Native, Electron, and web technologies ensure cross-platform compatibility.
